title: [Cobblemon] Grow and Gather
description: A Cobblemon addon that adds custom regional forms from the Jetia Region!
body:
# Explore the Jetia Region!

Pokemon Grow and Gather is a passion project of mine that has been in the works for just over a year! Inspired by festivals, family, and most importantly: **Gardening and Cooking**

You may notice that there is a severe lack of information on where certain pokemon spawn, to that I say: Go out and explore! Pack your bags and adventure out to find the silly pokemons! (or you can join my community I suppose... X'D)

**_Warning_**: this addon is currently in the Revival process, meaning there is a mix of both redesigns/remodels and older concepts! So apologies for any possible inconsistencies! <3

**_Warning Two_**: this project (and most fo my others), does not focus on the competitive viability or battling, instead it focuses on designs and worldbuilding. FOR THAT REASON: all of the redesigns combine two movesets that fit the brief, with stats that are an inbetween of the two. Im stating this just incase there is any confusion of why the movesets in the files seem... odd. that is because I am lazy!

<details>
<summary>New Evo Methods</summary>

  Dodiwi -> Doduo: lvl 14

  Feebas -> Milotic: trade whilst holding star sweet

  Pumpkaboo -> Spectuff: trade while holding a dusk stone

  Bovittle -> Tauros: high friendship at day (male only)
           -> P. Tauros: high friendship at night (male only)
           -> P. Tauros (aqua) : high friendship at night, holding water gem (male only)
           -> P. Tauros (blaze): high friendship at night, holding fire gem (male only)
           -> Miltank: high friendship at day (female only)
           -> P. Miltank: high friendship at night (female only)
           -> P. Miltank (berry) : high friendship at night, holding grass gem (female only)
           -> P. Miltank (shake): high friendship at night, holding ice gem (female only)
           -> Bouffalant: high friendship in a village (all genders)

  Todlbug -> Heracross: Dawn Stone
          -> Pinsir: Dusk Stone
          -> Hermiprance: walk 1000 blocks

  Omnibug -> Wimpod: high friendship
          -> Ledyba: high friendship
          -> Durant: trade whilst holding iron coat
          -> Scyther: iron sword
          -> Paras: red mushroom
          -> Venonat: allium
          -> Spinarak: string
          -> Yanma: strawberry sweet
          -> Pineco: metal coat whilst holding spruce log
          -> Nincada: sand
          -> Kricketot: note block
          -> Combee: flower sweet
          -> Karrablast: kings rock
          -> Shelmet: iron helmet
          -> Larvesta: sun stone
          -> Dewpider: water stone
          -> Sizzlipede: magma block
          -> Crawlcadet: iron chestplate
          -> Anorith: friendship + peat block
          -> Shuckle: trade whilst holding protector
          -> Ultimagrub: lvl 100

   Pupaint -> Smeargle: high friendship

   Smeargle -> Canvette: lvl 58

  ALL THE OTHER EVO METHODS ARE THE SAME AS THEIR ORIGINAL FORMS :D
</details>
this addon is not to be used on public servers without my permission - please message me on discord if you wish to feature my addon!!

However: you may use this addon on any youtube videos, or online posts (in fact I encourage it!) as long as you give proper credit to the addon and link to this page! <3

![The new Jetian Starters](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fa04b02e48fcd7b4da086586dabe6d28e7af466_0.webp)
